executive_summary: Today's top VC sourcing signals are heavily skewed towards India, with a notable absence of Southeast Asian leads, and are dominated by stealth-mode founders in the Consumer Electronics and Fintech sectors. The strongest archetypes emerging are second-time founders and senior executives with 10+ years of experience, with scores ranging from 65 to 85. Two particularly compelling leads, both with scores of 85, are stealth-mode founders in the Consumer Electronics space in India, although their names are currently unknown. These leads warrant further investigation, as they demonstrate a high potential for growth and alignment with our investment mandate, with the added bonus of operating in a geography and sector that is currently showing promise.

persons.name: Unknown
persons.investment_thesis: Aman Gupta, co-founder of the highly successful boAt, has launched a new venture, OFF/BEAT, and has already secured ₹100 Cr in funding. This indicates strong founder-market fit and execution capability, making him a prime candidate for our investment thesis focused on experienced founders with proven track records.
